company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing, helping content creators produce professional-quality videos faster and smarter.

plans.name: Pro Plan
plans.ideal_for: Professional YouTubers, Instagram creators, and full-time content creators

policies.refund_policy: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within 7 days are reviewed case by case.
policies.support: Basic plan users receive email support during business hours. 24/7 live support is exclusively available to Pro plan subscribers.
policies.cancellation: Users can cancel their subscription at any time. Access continues until the end of the billing cycle.
policies.free_trial: AutoStream does not currently offer a free trial, but a 7-day money-back guarantee is available.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports exports optimized for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, and Facebook.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Basic to Pro?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade at any time. You will be charged the prorated difference for the remainder of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faqs.answer: Team collaboration features are on the roadmap and will be available in a future update.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream accepts MP4, MOV, AVI, and MKV input files and exports in MP4 format.
